This conversation has used {used} tokens, which exceeds {modelИмя}'s available context of {target} tokens after reserving maximum output.

chat.modelSwitch.contextWindowGuard.runn: This conversation has used more context than the target модель's доступно context after reserving maximum вывод. The conversation must be compressed before переключитьing модельs, but the current задача is still выполняется and context compression cannot run now. Wait for the задача to finish, then переключить модельs again.
chat.modelSwitch.contextWindowGuard.stil: After compression, the context used by this conversation is still larger than the target model's available context after reserving maximum output. Модель switching was canceled.

bots.setup.bindDescription: Создать a bind code, then send the bind command in the bot private chat.
bots.setup.bound: {count} user(s) bound. Продолжить to configure this bot.
bots.setup.allowedAllDescription: This бот can use every конфигured рабочая область.
bots.setupDescription.chooseBot: Выбрать the third-party chat bot to connect.
bots.setupDescription.createBot: Enter бот or вебhook credentials. The next step tests подключитьivity first.
bots.setupDescription.bindBot: Создать a bind code and bind the account in the bot private chat.
bots.setupDescription.setBot: Set the default context, allowed рабочая областьs, and third-party reply detail.
bots.setup.guide.createNote: Prepare the third-party side first, then come back and клик Test and продолжить.
bots.setup.callbackUrlDescription.webhoo: Your external система should отправить inbound сообщение callbacks to this добавитьress. Asynchronous outbound replies still use the Вебhook URL entered on the left.
Вебhook binding uses the same endpoint: отправить a private callback request here with text = /bind <code>.
bots.setup.guide.telegram.create.1: Открыть @BotFather in Telegram and create a new bot.
bots.setup.guide.telegram.create.2: Копировать the HTTP API token returned by BotFather and paste it into this form.
bots.setup.guide.telegram.create.3: It helps to открыть the бот's private чат now because the bind команда must be sent there.
bots.setup.guide.telegram.bind.1: Return to Telegram and открыть the private чат with the бот you создатьd.
bots.setup.guide.telegram.bind.2: If the chat has never started, press Запустить or send any message first, then send {command}.
bots.setup.guide.telegram.bind.3: Come back here after Telegram подтвердитьs the bind succeeded.
bots.setup.guide.weixin.create.1: Запустить Weixin QR login, scan the QR code with Weixin, then confirm on your phone.
bots.setup.guide.weixin.create.2: ZCode saves the bot_token returned by iСсылка automatically; after scanning, send any message to the bot in Weixin to activate the chat.
bots.setup.guide.weixin.create.3: ZCode uses a built-in iСсылка client: `/ilink/bot/getupdates` for long polling and `/ilink/bot/sendmessage` for replies.
bots.setup.guide.weixin.bind.1: Открыть the Weixin direct chat you want to bind.
bots.setup.guide.weixin.bind.3: Come back here after the bind succeeds to finish the рабочая область and CLI defaults.
bots.setup.guide.feishu.create.1: Создать a self-built app in the Feishu/Lark developer console and enable bot capability.
bots.setup.guide.feishu.create.2: Копировать the App ID and App Секрет, then enable persistent connection events for `im.message.receive_v1` and card actions.
bots.setup.guide.feishu.create.3: Выбрать the matching Feishu or Lark domain here, then paste the credentials into the form.
bots.setup.guide.feishu.bind.1: Установить the app into your tenant and open a direct chat with the bot.
bots.setup.guide.feishu.bind.3: Return here after the bind succeeds to finish the рабочая область and CLI defaults.
bots.setup.guide.webhook.create.1: Вебhook mode does not require a native бот in the third-party product; your integration only needs to POST сообщениеs to ZCode.
bots.setup.guide.webhook.create.2: Set a shared secret first; добавить an outbound вебhook URL as well if you want asynchronous replies pushed back.
bots.setup.guide.webhook.create.3: Сохранить one stable userId per external user so binding and future context resolve to the same person.
bots.setup.guide.webhook.bind.1: POST a private-сообщение callback to ZCode's `/api/ботs/вебhook` endpoint.
bots.setup.guide.webhook.bind.2: The payload should at least include this botId, a stable userId, `chatТип: "private"`, and set text to {command}.
bots.setup.guide.webhook.bind.3: If the бот uses a secret, also отправить `x-zcode-бот-secret`; then return here after the bind succeeds.
bots.setup.footer.choose: Выбрать a supported bot to continue.
bots.setup.footer.bind: The bind code initially allows all рабочая областьs; the final scope is сохранитьd next.
bots.setup.footer.set: Завершить enables the bot and returns it to the added list.
bots.setup.discardDescription: This setup flow is not finished. The temporary бот will be удалитьd.
